nodes.label: WebSearchTool (Tool.define 'websearch'; description loaded from sibling websearch.txt; picks exa or parallel provider, asks websearch permission, calls McpWebSearch)
nodes.norm_label: websearchtool (tool.define 'websearch'; description loaded from sibling websearch.txt; picks exa or parallel provider, asks websearch permission, calls mcpwebsearch)

nodes.label: selectWebSearchProvider (deterministic exa/parallel selection: env override > flags > checksum(sessionID) % 2)
nodes.norm_label: selectwebsearchprovider (deterministic exa/parallel selection: env override > flags > checksum(sessionid) % 2)

nodes.label: webSearchModelName (extract model id for parallel provider telemetry)
nodes.norm_label: websearchmodelname (extract model id for parallel provider telemetry)

nodes.label: callProvider (dispatches to McpWebSearch.call with provider-specific args)
nodes.norm_label: callprovider (dispatches to mcpwebsearch.call with provider-specific args)

nodes.label: LspTool (Tool.define 'lsp'; description in lsp.txt; routes 9 LSP operations: goToDefinition, findReferences, hover, documentSymbol, workspaceSymbol, goToImplementation, prepareCallHierarchy, incomingCalls, outgoingCalls)
nodes.norm_label: lsptool (tool.define 'lsp'; description in lsp.txt; routes 9 lsp operations: gotodefinition, findreferences, hover, documentsymbol, workspacesymbol, gotoimplementation, preparecallhierarchy, incomingcalls, outgoingcalls)

nodes.label: TaskStatusTool (Tool.define 'task_status'; description in task_status.txt; polls BackgroundJob/Session state with optional wait+timeout; requires OPENCODE_EXPERIMENTAL_BACKGROUND_SUBAGENTS)
nodes.norm_label: taskstatustool (tool.define 'task_status'; description in task_status.txt; polls backgroundjob/session state with optional wait+timeout; requires opencode_experimental_background_subagents)

nodes.label: GlobTool (Tool.define 'glob'; description in glob.txt; uses Ripgrep.files with limit=100; sorts by mtime desc)
nodes.norm_label: globtool (tool.define 'glob'; description in glob.txt; uses ripgrep.files with limit=100; sorts by mtime desc)

nodes.label: GrepTool (Tool.define 'grep'; description in grep.txt; uses Ripgrep.search; limit=100 matches; MAX_LINE_LENGTH=2000; sorts by mtime desc)
nodes.norm_label: greptool (tool.define 'grep'; description in grep.txt; uses ripgrep.search; limit=100 matches; max_line_length=2000; sorts by mtime desc)

nodes.label: EditTool (Tool.define 'edit'; description in edit.txt; per-file Semaphore lock; create-or-replace; runs Format.file then refreshes BOM; publishes File.Event.Edited+FileWatcher.Event.Updated; reports LSP diagnostics)
nodes.norm_label: edittool (tool.define 'edit'; description in edit.txt; per-file semaphore lock; create-or-replace; runs format.file then refreshes bom; publishes file.event.edited+filewatcher.event.updated; reports lsp diagnostics)

nodes.label: lock (per-file Semaphore registry keyed by resolved path)
nodes.norm_label: lock (per-file semaphore registry keyed by resolved path)

nodes.label: levenshtein (string edit distance for fuzzy match scoring)
nodes.norm_label: levenshtein (string edit distance for fuzzy match scoring)

nodes.label: BlockAnchorReplacer (first+last line anchors, levenshtein middle similarity)
nodes.norm_label: blockanchorreplacer (first+last line anchors, levenshtein middle similarity)

nodes.label: MultiOccurrenceReplacer (yields every exact occurrence for replaceAll)
nodes.norm_label: multioccurrencereplacer (yields every exact occurrence for replaceall)

nodes.label: ContextAwareReplacer (first+last anchors with 50% middle line agreement)
nodes.norm_label: contextawarereplacer (first+last anchors with 50% middle line agreement)

nodes.label: trimDiff (strips common leading indent from diff body lines)
nodes.norm_label: trimdiff (strips common leading indent from diff body lines)

nodes.label: replace (tries 9 Replacer strategies in order until exact-once or replaceAll match; throws if ambiguous)
nodes.norm_label: replace (tries 9 replacer strategies in order until exact-once or replaceall match; throws if ambiguous)

nodes.label: QuestionTool (Tool.define 'question'; description in question.txt; delegates to Question.Service.ask)
nodes.norm_label: questiontool (tool.define 'question'; description in question.txt; delegates to question.service.ask)

nodes.label: ShellTool (Tool.define ShellID.ToolID='bash'; description in shell.txt rendered per shell via ShellPrompt; parses commands with tree-sitter; partitions external-dir vs bash permission asks; streams output with truncation to disk)
nodes.norm_label: shelltool (tool.define shellid.toolid='bash'; description in shell.txt rendered per shell via shellprompt; parses commands with tree-sitter; partitions external-dir vs bash permission asks; streams output with truncation to disk)

nodes.label: resolveWasm (resolve tree-sitter wasm asset URL/file path)
nodes.norm_label: resolvewasm (resolve tree-sitter wasm asset url/file path)

nodes.label: parts (extract command_name/word/string tokens from tree-sitter Node)
nodes.norm_label: parts (extract command_name/word/string tokens from tree-sitter node)

nodes.label: source (capture command source text including redirections)
nodes.norm_label: source (capture command source text including redirections)

nodes.label: provider (parse PowerShell provider:: prefixes like FileSystem::)
nodes.norm_label: provider (parse powershell provider:: prefixes like filesystem::)

nodes.label: dynamic (detect $(), ${}, backticks - dynamic expressions skipped for path resolution)
nodes.norm_label: dynamic (detect $(), ${}, backticks - dynamic expressions skipped for path resolution)

nodes.label: prefix (strip glob metacharacters to get literal path prefix)
nodes.norm_label: prefix (strip glob metacharacters to get literal path prefix)

nodes.label: pathArgs (filter command tokens to plausible path args, respecting flags/switches)
nodes.norm_label: pathargs (filter command tokens to plausible path args, respecting flags/switches)

nodes.label: tail (keep last maxLines/maxBytes of output respecting UTF-8 boundaries)
nodes.norm_label: tail (keep last maxlines/maxbytes of output respecting utf-8 boundaries)

nodes.label: parse (Effect.fn 'ShellTool.parse'; lazy-loads tree-sitter-bash or tree-sitter-powershell wasm)
nodes.norm_label: parse (effect.fn 'shelltool.parse'; lazy-loads tree-sitter-bash or tree-sitter-powershell wasm)

nodes.label: ask (issues external_directory + bash permission asks via ctx.ask)
nodes.norm_label: ask (issues external_directory + bash permission asks via ctx.ask)

nodes.label: cmd (ChildProcess.make - special PowerShell invocation on Windows, /bin/sh -c otherwise)
nodes.norm_label: cmd (childprocess.make - special powershell invocation on windows, /bin/sh -c otherwise)

nodes.label: parser (lazy() loader for tree-sitter Parser+bash+ps Languages)
nodes.norm_label: parser (lazy() loader for tree-sitter parser+bash+ps languages)

nodes.label: InvalidTool (Tool.define 'invalid'; placeholder when args fail validation)
nodes.norm_label: invalidtool (tool.define 'invalid'; placeholder when args fail validation)

nodes.label: ToolRegistry.layer (Layer.effect that wires all builtin tools + plugin/user-defined tools from {tool,tools}/*.ts dirs)
nodes.norm_label: toolregistry.layer (layer.effect that wires all builtin tools + plugin/user-defined tools from {tool,tools}/*.ts dirs)

nodes.label: ToolRegistry.defaultLayer (provides every dependency layer to ToolRegistry.layer)
nodes.norm_label: toolregistry.defaultlayer (provides every dependency layer to toolregistry.layer)

nodes.label: webSearchEnabled (gate websearch on opencode provider or --exa/--parallel flag)
nodes.norm_label: websearchenabled (gate websearch on opencode provider or --exa/--parallel flag)

nodes.label: fromPlugin (wrap plugin ToolDefinition as Tool.Def; bridges Effect ask -> Promise; truncates output)
nodes.norm_label: fromplugin (wrap plugin tooldefinition as tool.def; bridges effect ask -> promise; truncates output)

nodes.label: describeSkill (formats available skill list for SkillTool description)
nodes.norm_label: describeskill (formats available skill list for skilltool description)

nodes.label: describeTask (formats available subagent list for TaskTool description, filtered by permission)
nodes.norm_label: describetask (formats available subagent list for tasktool description, filtered by permission)

nodes.label: isPluginTool (heuristic for plugin tool shape: has args+description+execute)
nodes.norm_label: isplugintool (heuristic for plugin tool shape: has args+description+execute)

nodes.label: zodJsonSchema (convert ZodType to JSONSchema7 via z.toJSONSchema)
nodes.norm_label: zodjsonschema (convert zodtype to jsonschema7 via z.tojsonschema)

nodes.label: normalizeZodJsonSchema (strip boolean exclusiveMaximum/Minimum that aren't JSONSchema7-compatible)
nodes.norm_label: normalizezodjsonschema (strip boolean exclusivemaximum/minimum that aren't jsonschema7-compatible)

nodes.label: ApplyPatchTool (Tool.define 'apply_patch'; description in apply_patch.txt; parses Patch.parsePatch then dispatches add/update/delete/move hunks; for GPT models per registry gating)
nodes.norm_label: applypatchtool (tool.define 'apply_patch'; description in apply_patch.txt; parses patch.parsepatch then dispatches add/update/delete/move hunks; for gpt models per registry gating)

nodes.label: WriteTool (Tool.define 'write'; description in write.txt; creates/overwrites file; runs Format.file; reports LSP diagnostics for current+other files capped at MAX_PROJECT_DIAGNOSTICS_FILES=5)
nodes.norm_label: writetool (tool.define 'write'; description in write.txt; creates/overwrites file; runs format.file; reports lsp diagnostics for current+other files capped at max_project_diagnostics_files=5)

nodes.label: RepoCloneTool (Tool.define 'repo_clone'; description in repo_clone.txt; clones/refreshes via RepositoryCache; experimental scout feature)
nodes.norm_label: repoclonetool (tool.define 'repo_clone'; description in repo_clone.txt; clones/refreshes via repositorycache; experimental scout feature)

nodes.label: Truncate.layer (Layer.effect; runs cleanup hourly with 1min delay; honours tool_output config)
nodes.norm_label: truncate.layer (layer.effect; runs cleanup hourly with 1min delay; honours tool_output config)

nodes.label: hasTaskTool (Permission.evaluate('task','*') !== deny — used to suggest explore-agent delegation in hint)
nodes.norm_label: hastasktool (permission.evaluate('task','*') !== deny — used to suggest explore-agent delegation in hint)

nodes.label: PlanExitTool (Tool.define 'plan_exit'; description in plan-exit.txt; asks user to switch from plan->build agent, injects synthetic 'Execute the plan' user message)
nodes.norm_label: planexittool (tool.define 'plan_exit'; description in plan-exit.txt; asks user to switch from plan->build agent, injects synthetic 'execute the plan' user message)

nodes.label: TaskTool (Tool.define 'task'; description in task.txt + appended BACKGROUND_DESCRIPTION when experimental; spawns subagent session inheriting permission via deriveSubagentSessionPermission; foreground or background mode)
nodes.norm_label: tasktool (tool.define 'task'; description in task.txt + appended background_description when experimental; spawns subagent session inheriting permission via derivesubagentsessionpermission; foreground or background mode)

nodes.label: backgroundOutput (initial running state output for background task)
nodes.norm_label: backgroundoutput (initial running state output for background task)

nodes.label: backgroundMessage (renders completion/error message injected back into parent session)
nodes.norm_label: backgroundmessage (renders completion/error message injected back into parent session)

nodes.label: SkillTool (Tool.define 'skill'; description in skill.txt; loads SKILL.md content + sample of up to 10 sibling files; emits <skill_content>+<skill_files> block)
nodes.norm_label: skilltool (tool.define 'skill'; description in skill.txt; loads skill.md content + sample of up to 10 sibling files; emits <skill_content>+<skill_files> block)

nodes.label: ShellPrompt (renders shell.txt template per shell kind: bash/pwsh/powershell/cmd; produces matching parameter schema)
nodes.norm_label: shellprompt (renders shell.txt template per shell kind: bash/pwsh/powershell/cmd; produces matching parameter schema)

nodes.label: ShellID (Kind = bash|pwsh|powershell|cmd; ToolID const stays 'bash' for plugin/permission compatibility)
nodes.norm_label: shellid (kind = bash|pwsh|powershell|cmd; toolid const stays 'bash' for plugin/permission compatibility)

nodes.label: Worktree.layer (Layer.effect; depends on AppFileSystem, AppProcess, Git, Project, InstanceStore)
nodes.norm_label: worktree.layer (layer.effect; depends on appfilesystem, appprocess, git, project, instancestore)

nodes.label: failedRemoves (parse 'warning: failed to remove ...' lines out of git output)
nodes.norm_label: failedremoves (parse 'warning: failed to remove ...' lines out of git output)
